Davi Raubach
home about compositions writings accordion contact

Composições

After the Wind   acousmatic

2019
Premiered on CIM (Círculo de Invenção Musical) concert on October 18, 2019, in Curitiba.

I lost myself by this space
slowly walking after the wind
attentive to the broken sidewalk tiles
and carried these sounds to here like one who carries water
every portion in a sieve


To Be Born Stone, to Die Cloud   for guitar and electronics

2018
Premiered by Eric Moreira at SESC Paço da Liberdade, Curitiba, on November 22, 2018.

Score

Essay on Curtains   acousmatic

2018
Premiered on Círculo de Invenção Musical (CIM) concert as part of the Symposium International of New Music 2018 at Sesc Paço da Liberdade in Curitiba.


Autumn Floor   for flute and electronics

2017-8
Premiered by Valentina Daldegan. "Chão de outono" is the result of a collaboration between the composer and the flutist Valentina Daldegan. It is based on the homonymous poem of Mario Quintana. This is a possible translation for it:

Autumn Floor
Throughout the uneven stones of the paving, poor yellow leaves in a panic pass by, pursued by an invitation of burial, sinister, crackling, each time nearer and nearer, two wings dressed in black!

Throughout the piece, the flutist recites the poem and plays the flute concurrently.
Score
Software and other materials for performance

Peace   for baritone and piano

My Favorite Excerpt   for accordion, guitar and voice

2015
based on Mario Quintana homonymous poem.

What moves me the most, in music, are these loose notes, poor single notes that the piano tuner pulls out of the keyboard...

Score

not premiered

Trio   for accordion, flute and viola

2014
Premiered by Júlio Zabaleta (flute), Matheus Sacramento (viola), and Davi Raubach (accordion) in 2013.

Tempo Feio   for two guitars

Premiered by Júlio Zabaleta (flute), Matheus Sacramento (viola), and Davi Raubach (accordion) in 2013.
